reference.source: trace task prompt and verifier text
reference.expected_behavior: run_tasks should cancel active async tasks and await cleanup under failures or outer cancellation

decision_evidence.text: I will inspect run.py, implement cancellation-safe task orchestration, and run focused async checks.
The implementation uses asyncio.Semaphore, gathers active tasks, cancels pending work on the first exception, and awaits cleanup before re-raising.

failure_patterns.name: no critical failure detected
failure_patterns.rationale: Verifier passed; run can be used as positive evidence for closure behavior.

diagnosis: No critical failure detected; verifier passed and the trace can serve as positive closure behavior.
